notes: Reviewed EN batch for src/data/items.ts item/use strings and all src/data/slime_defs.ts slime definition text. Russian source remains canonical.

entries.gt_db6dfe924d3220: Satiety +${v}, infection -${hpLoss} HP. Check HP after eating
entries.gt_05c49131275083: Water +${v}. Check your flask before going out
entries.gt_66e7bff579ca35: Healing +${hp}. The wound has been bandaged
entries.gt_f6104ffe924c9f: Seal removed: blue sample opened. Burn -6 HP, local contamination
entries.gt_03bc2e6f56b722: The blue sample gave a short surge: PSI +18, alertness +10, burn -8 HP
entries.gt_48359b8bf9d94d: Stale ration slice. Dry enough to prop up a complaint.
entries.gt_d7a2ce6bc906a9: Canned meat with no extra questions about the meat. The lid is more honest than the label.
entries.gt_e2dd1fc97e7bc6: Cold state-issue kasha. The spoon stands in it by regulation.
entries.gt_bb21424231644b: Suspicious piece with no origin protocol. Weakly filling, but useful as meat bait.
entries.gt_aac611ce362bad: Harvest cut from a wet laundry room. Filling; carnivorous mycelium is interested too.
entries.gt_dc92dfcb6b1abd: Spotted cap after the damp. Gives a little satiety and takes HP if eaten without need.
entries.gt_619f4cd6233a72: Cold lump of cellar mold. Gives satiety, roughly tans skin, and hits HP.
entries.gt_dd20aff4a9a0de: Dark tanned plate from the cellar. Safer than raw and still works as fungal bait.
entries.gt_b512d621e3d31c: Slimy poultice after boiling water. Heals a little and gives cheap skin protection.
entries.gt_893af989213ecd: Clean zhelemish sample in an NII container. The seal matters more than the contents: without it, the lab sees only dirt and a pretext.
entries.gt_493260be101ab2: Open lump of zhelemish with someone else's dust, skin, and mycelium. Good for rumors, but NII will not accept such a sample.
entries.gt_bc719019f3266e: Gray packet of salt for mycelium, meat, and someone else's caution. On carnivorous mold it hisses better than persuasion.
entries.gt_941ec78980d965: Cheap wrap: briefly muffles PSI, leaves cough, debt, and smoke bait. You can smoke it, sell it, turn it in, or throw it as a distraction.
entries.gt_48b00b0567309d: Dense briquette from the market basement. Stronger relief, more noticeable debt; good merchandise for buy-up, denunciation, or bait.
entries.gt_b8a4451291e547: Sealed laboratory sample. Scientists pay for the composition, liquidators ask about the source. Do not open or smoke it: after the broken seal it is already spoiled evidence.
entries.gt_c8c16bc08993ec: Uneven batch with acrid smoke. Relief is worse, cough and debt stronger; the market moves it fast, monsters scent it readily.
entries.gt_7c9b5ce1dbd208: Bottle of water. Take it before the lift: without water, pills and running get worse fast.
entries.gt_e36c0581264187: Cooled tea from the communal kitchen. Less water than a bottle, but easier to find.
entries.gt_72d58cdd1da2e4: Cloudy canteen kompot. Good water reserve before a short sortie.
entries.gt_de087a9b969bc6: Roll of bandage with hospital dust. Small healing you need right after a cut.
entries.gt_db7b706fc01d6c: Painkillers from the medicine cabinet. Heals 25 HP, adds +3 PSI and a little quiet.
entries.gt_493305386ab782: Rare pill after PSI breaks and bad sorties. +12 PSI, does not heal HP.
entries.gt_7fd6b34ec02080: Consecrated water from a pilgrim flask. Heals 20 HP and returns +10 PSI.
entries.gt_4ab9f97efee142: Easter kulich from the church kitchen. Filling, sweet, suspiciously bright.
entries.gt_c73a5d4734f35a: Kulich warmed the stomach and thoughts: food +35, PSI +4
entries.gt_a6fc94a40212ef: Dyed egg with a crack shaped like an entrance block. Restores 10 HP, +3 PSI.
entries.gt_9822e438062cae: The shell cracked; the head felt steadier: +10 HP, +3 PSI
entries.gt_37b73832287c84: Thin candle from the communal church stock. Calms PSI for a minute, but the question of "whose it is" remains. +6 PSI.
entries.gt_02049715fad427: Candle smokes gold: PSI +6. The queue outside the door did not see this
entries.gt_af77c11afa8b49: White worker concentrate. Cheap, exactly by norm; cooks ask you to eat it warm and not smell it.
entries.gt_6477d4e123ed8e: Experimental concentrate with the official word filler. More filling than belyak, more talkative than the label.
entries.gt_035cce65555747: Chernyak from closed issue: a dense ration smelling of the armory, wet greatcoat, and an undated order.
entries.gt_c26abe305b8591: One cube, one lunch, one doubt.
entries.gt_55c999e05e6c40: Red sweet bonus-concentrate. Almost festive in taste, which only makes the composition rumors worse.
entries.gt_9ae6d85b48bb59: Almost transparent water from the filter. More expensive than regular water, but holds a long route better.
entries.gt_6e9ad8adf6284e: Hot water from a scale-lined kettle.
entries.gt_dd48179dfef9ed: You can drink it. You cannot trust it.
entries.gt_87fc1b241d7470: Sweet drink for night duty. Gives water and a little alertness, then asks for the latrine.
entries.gt_7ddac2b6275f8a: Water +18, alertness +10. Find a latrine afterward
entries.gt_3005877c060ec7: Warm brew from a clinic mug. Bitter as if it knows the diagnosis. +5 PSI.
entries.gt_91aa311ddbbe04: Old rubber tourniquet. Fast small healing before you reach a doctor.
entries.gt_b9e089c7d778f0: Burns skin and dirt. Small healing for cuts after storage rooms or fights.
entries.gt_76b6f7310769b1: Pills against ordinary filth. In quarantine this is not treatment, it is a choice of queue.
entries.gt_2168fbe955d412: Strong pain relief under strict accounting. Pain leaves, debt remains.
entries.gt_4c1f41e61a9a7d: Calms the tremor after clots. +20 PSI: one strong impulse, not a new life.
entries.gt_09cff6fc736280: Bandage, alcohol, and unsigned instructions. Heals the owner or goes whole into quarantine triage.
entries.gt_0dea06c69e3599: Greasy ointment for fungal itch and spores on skin. Heals little, but helps you last until the medpost.
entries.gt_e880c534e2c37a: Heavy pipe smelling of the riser. Damage 19. Keeps distance in an emergency, but the swing is long. Durability 60
entries.gt_237bc13a1257f0: Reliable fitter's wrench. Damage 12. Lasts longer than a hammer, hits honestly. Durability 115
entries.gt_ec810229421c9b: Kitchen knife from the communal kitchen. Damage 7. Fastest emergency fight. Durability 32
entries.gt_22a3822cfc3364: Piece of rebar from an old wall. Damage 24. Long heavy jab. Durability 95
entries.gt_07842216cbf894: Fire axe. Damage 34. Short strong hit with a long recovery. Durability 65
entries.gt_1875dc68190764: Chainsaw. Damage 42. Panic meat grinder for a few hits. Durability 14
entries.gt_a7e2b00d5991bf: PM pistol. Damage 16. Accurate cheap shot, not a burst. 9mm rounds
entries.gt_8c2bfc6f3150ac: Submachine gun. Damage 6. Suppresses with tempo and quickly eats 9mm
entries.gt_4e301d994f11a7: Sawed-off shotgun. Damage 9x7. Wide close stopper for the corridor. Shot
entries.gt_12bed57eeff1ae: Industrial nailgun. Damage 11. Accurate working shot, nails are scarce
entries.gt_7d571ab82c2ddb: PKM. Damage 10. Harshest ammo drain, wide spread. Belt-fed
entries.gt_b3c26b0fc7fdeb: RGD-5. Damage 90 in an area. Throw and hide
entries.gt_96bcf733dbbb96: Railgun. Damage 150. Slow precise shot for one energy cell
entries.gt_f5cbaafea4a157: Plasma weapon. Damage 18. Fast inaccurate waste of energy cells
entries.gt_d3299d76537725: Heavy experimental NII gun. Damage 230 over a large area. Energy cells vanish together with the room
entries.gt_ce36fedf35915b: GBE. Rare NET gun: an expensive impulse per energy cell deletes a line of walls, targets, and some loot. Do not fire near the reward.
entries.gt_33114c30d2cc50: Short stream of fire. Damage 4 per spit. Burns out slime and fungal film, spends gasoline fast
entries.gt_d61bf919bb2875: Cheap toxic lead: evacuate residents, file a cleanup act, then choose NII log, burn-off, market, stash, or report.
entries.gt_412ad89999a3f6: Toxic film: respirator, cleanup act, intact seal, bypass, or burn-off before anyone resettles the room.
entries.gt_784c2ae8fc3526: Intact brown seal pays little, but proves where the smell source was.
entries.gt_d672074d4ea4e4: A torn brown seal quickly stops being a sample and becomes a sanitary claim against the carrier.
entries.gt_d55eee4d7d5280: Acid containment check: filter layer, tongs, and separate container matter more than the price.
entries.gt_d8f846ccd10463: OVS acid sample: keep distance, take with tongs, neutralize with alkali, and keep away from fabric.
entries.gt_9ebf07f43ce44d: Intact green jar is dangerous for cloth and food, but NII accepts it as a clean OVS fact.
entries.gt_e6834e68c353ec: Opened green sample hisses without fire and spoils nearby loot faster than any spore.
entries.gt_166cbb33646695: Mutagenic witness route: access, a living witness, a matte box, and a choice between NII, market, forgery, stash, or report.
entries.gt_e010067f5baa0c: Mutagenic sample: do not look, do not place under a lamp, close it in a matte box, and remove witnesses.
entries.gt_7cc6740155f6ac: Intact white sample is valuable only while people are not staring at it.
entries.gt_3fa6b6662b7dc0: A crooked white seal turns the reward into a quarantine report and other people's voices in the corridor.
entries.gt_864436181ddab7: Sticky route control: the red zone slows, makes a trap, and is bought by those who prepare a passage in advance.
entries.gt_1fabae5ac6d4e9: Skirt the sticky zone by the edge; fire or solvent holds the passage, and the sample should be taken only after cells are cleared.
entries.gt_a4ab5074efdc15: Intact red sample proves the trap composition and works for countermeasures.
entries.gt_c127b910462578: Opened red sample sticks to the backpack, door, and trail later used to find the carrier.
entries.gt_d8f806b47aaf47: Mass spawn-risk sample: first UV/sealant, then jar, then NII, burn-off, market, or denunciation.
entries.gt_333df1229f0689: Black mass breeds threats: seal it, shine UV, or burn it; do not leave a cult or smoking room nearby.
entries.gt_0058317b9e3ab4: Intact black seal holds the mass until the UV post and raises NII price.
entries.gt_8e0bdf52dbf688: Warm black jar is no longer a single sample: eyes, cult, and a reason for burn-off appear nearby.
entries.gt_9ac3905ca270f8: Light energy-scare sample: hermobox, shielding, lamps, and payment for an intact ampoule.
entries.gt_59d0a81bbf9f25: Shield the blue sample with a container; do not carry it near lamps and panels.
entries.gt_71e11ce127127e: Intact blue ampoule shines through fabric, but remains a result, not a burn.
entries.gt_f6f1bbe0820938: Open blue light is filed as damage to the container and hand, not as scientific loot.
entries.gt_b2cf8e976b7f39: Deceptively valuable temptation route: legal NII pays less than the market, opening spoils the price and starts a rumor.
entries.gt_4d229fcbe45bcc: Deceptively valuable transparent sample: do not taste, do not open, submit only sealed or keep as evidence.
entries.gt_c2aa566e9e1fb9: Intact transparent seal is expensive exactly because the jar looks almost empty.
entries.gt_6bda983d542e7e: Opened transparent sample gives the effect now and suspicion later: the goods get cheaper, the explanation gets expensive.
entries.gt_1479386c1df95a: No-look void route: take the sample by memory, route matters more than gaze, reward pays for discipline.
entries.gt_228e9023512ce7: Do not look at the shimmer; cover the marks, follow the pre-marked route, and turn it in without demonstration.
entries.gt_6f4b1de0d35e5b: Intact seroburmaline container proves the carrier did not check the shimmer with their eyes.
entries.gt_ffec4958689e98: Broken seal on seroburmaline means an argument with the jar, already lost in the protocol.
